basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support-II Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 30 years.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + five years' of experience in relevant subject / field, Three years' graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject
qualification.details: Project Technical Support- II: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + five years' of experience in relevant subject / field Or Three years' graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject

salary_details.details: Project Technical Support- II: 20,000/- + HRA, as admissible

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.text: Project Technical Support- II: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + five years' of experience in relevant subject / field Or Three years' graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Project Technical Support- II post at AIIMS Delhi is 15 July 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications via email well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support- II posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Project Technical Support- II position in the AIIMS Delhi recruitment drive. Interested candidates should check the notification for specific details regarding this single opening.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II posts?
faq.answer: Candidates interested in the Project Technical Support- II position at AIIMS Delhi must apply via Email. Ensure all required documents and the application form are properly attached and sent to the designated email address before the closing date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Project Technical Support- II at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support- II post is 30 years. Age relaxation rules, if applicable for specific categories, should be verified from the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support- II position at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The Project Technical Support- II position at AIIMS Delhi offers a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month, plus HRA as admissible. This remuneration package is detailed in the official recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential educational qualifications for Project Technical Support- II?
faq.answer: Candidates need 12th in Science with a Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering or equivalent) and five years' experience, OR a three-year graduate degree in a relevant field with two years' experience. Detailed qualifications are in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Project Technical Support- II posts at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The selection process for Project Technical Support- II involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an Online or Physical Interview. Candidates will be informed about the interview schedule after the shortlisting process.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job location for the Project Technical Support- II position?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Technical Support- II position is New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029. This position is based at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi campus.

faq.answer: The official notification PDF for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support- II Recruitment 2026 can be accessed via the important links section of this article. It contains comprehensive details regarding the application process and eligibility.
